{"rule":"COMMA_PARENTHESIS_WHITESPACE","sentence":"^\\Q<!doctype html> <html> <head> <title>Test</title> </head> <body> <div> <video id=\"video\" autoplay playsinline style=\"width: 100%\" /> </div> <script> navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ video: true }); </script> <p>Hello</p> </body> </html>\\E$"}
{"rule":"COMMA_PARENTHESIS_WHITESPACE","sentence":"^\\Q<!doctype html> <html> <head> <title>Test</title> </head> <body> <div> <video id=\"video\" autoplay playsinline style=\"width: 100%\" /> </div> <script> navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ video: true }) .then((stream) => { const video = document.getElementById(\"video\"); video.srcObject = stream; }) </script> <p>Hello</p> </body> </html>\\E$"}
{"rule":"ARROWS","sentence":"^\\Q<!doctype html> <html> <head> <title>Test</title> </head> <body> <div> <video id=\"video\" autoplay playsinline style=\"width: 100%\" /> </div> <script> navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ video: true }) .then((stream) => { const video = document.getElementById(\"video\"); video.srcObject = stream; }) </script> <p>Hello</p> </body> </html>\\E$"}
